contacts.title: Deputy General Manager
contacts.fit_reason: Leads venue operations, client services, event booking solutions and sustainable sourcing. Directly influences reservations processes, event distribution, guest/delegate communications and operational technology decisions including potential AI automation and revenue tech.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Extensively featured on official team page with long bio; direct personal email and phone publicly listed in official Instagram trade show promotions alongside role; referenced in multiple venue news posts as key contact for tours and events.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Contact us for a tour with Joe Harris, our Deputy General Manager, who is here to help you with smart event solutions tailored to your needs. Started as part-time in 2012, became Client Services Manager then Deputy General Manager. Adopted role of 'sustainable sourcer'.
Joe Harris Deputy General Manager joe@15hatfields.com 020 7928 6326
Joe Harris, Deputy General Manager. Kat Fortson and Joe Harris at the 15Hatfields stand.

contacts.title: Sales Manager
contacts.other_contact_detail: CIEH main contacts via cieh.org; supports 15Hatfields commercial activities
contacts.fit_reason: Sales leadership role at the management organization (CIEH) operating 15Hatfields. Influences commercial strategy, client acquisition, revenue generation and training/compliance solutions that can extend to venue booking and revenue tech adoption.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Listed with direct business email on official CIEH training experts / sales contact page with detailed responsibilities.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Jon Flatman, Sales Manager. jon.flatman@cieh.org. With over 15 years of experience at CIEH... supports new clients in identifying the most cost-effective, scalable training options.

contacts.fit_reason: Key account management at CIEH (operator of 15Hatfields) focused on hospitality sector clients, retention, commercial outcomes, and tailored solutions. Plausible influence on revenue operations, CRM, and tech-enabled client communications.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Listed with direct business email on official CIEH training experts / sales contact page with detailed bio tying to hospitality and commercial results.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Liam McCarthy, Key Account Manager. liam.mccarthy@cieh.org. Since joining CIEH in 2018... driving client retention, expanding account value, and delivering measurable commercial and operational outcomes... hospitality, and facilities management.
